name: Stone and Electrical Contractors
message: Stone & Sons Electrical Contractors, Inc offers a wide range of electrical services in the Transportation, Industrial and Municipal Markets including new construction, custom designs/installations, repairs, maintenance and systems upgrades.﻿First established in 1994, our business now has more than 85 field employees as well as a large support staff. Our support staff includes a team of project managers, estimators, and electrical engineers. Together, our team offers our clients over 160 years of combined experience.
